required_skills: Vendor Relationship Management and Supplier Engagement
Vendor Performance Monitoring and KPI Evaluation
Contract Management and Service Level Agreement (SLA) Administration
Supplier Risk Assessment and Compliance Management
preferred_skills: Process Improvement and Vendor Lifecycle Optimization
responsibilities: Manage vendor relationships and communication channels to ensure contract compliance, service quality, and alignment with business objectives.
Monitor vendor performance against service level agreements and key performance indicators to drive accountability and continuous improvement.
Conduct supplier risk assessments and compliance reviews to identify potential operational, financial, and regulatory concerns.
Develop vendor performance reports and dashboards that provide visibility into supplier effectiveness and contract outcomes.
Collaborate with procurement, legal, finance, and operations teams to support vendor onboarding and governance processes.
Implement vendor management frameworks and escalation procedures that improve issue resolution and supplier accountability standards.
Evaluate supplier capabilities, operational performance, and service delivery metrics to support sourcing and renewal decisions.
Lead vendor review meetings and performance discussions to strengthen partnerships and drive measurable business improvements.
